'''nasatha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycoplankton|mycoplankton]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-s-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycoplankton|mycoplankton]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| nasatha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:næsæthæth|næsæthæth]] || [[word:næsæthæj|næsæthæj]] || [[word:næsæthæsh|næsæthæsh]] || [[word:næsæthæ|næsæthæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nasasathath|nasasathath]] || [[word:nasasathaj|nasasathaj]] || [[word:nasasathash|nasasathash]] || [[word:nasasatha|nasasatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nasathath|nasathath]] || [[word:nasathaj|nasathaj]] || [[word:nasathash|nasathash]] || [[word:nasatha|nasatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nasafthath|nasafthath]] || [[word:nasafthaj|nasafthaj]] || [[word:nasafthash|nasafthash]] || [[word:nasafthaf|nasafthaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nasathatha|nasathatha]] || [[word:nasathaja|nasathaja]] || [[word:nasathasha|nasathasha]] || [[word:nasathaka|nasathaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nasathath|nasathath]] || [[word:nasathaj|nasathaj]] || [[word:nasathash|nasathash]] || [[word:nasatha|nasatha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nasathathal|nasathathal]] || [[word:nasathajal|nasathajal]] || [[word:nasathashal|nasathashal]] || [[word:nasathakal|nasathakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nasathathatha|nasathathatha]] || [[word:nasathajaja|nasathajaja]] || [[word:nasathashasha|nasathashasha]] || [[word:nasathaka|nasathaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nasathathan|nasathathan]] || [[word:nasathajan|nasathajan]] || [[word:nasathashan|nasathashan]] || [[word:nasathakan|nasathakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nasathathaoro|nasathathaoro]] || [[word:nasathajaoro|nasathajaoro]] || [[word:nasathashaoro|nasathashaoro]] || [[word:nasathakaoro|nasathakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
